Star Wars: One of the most iconic franchises in the galaxy, Star Wars™ has been captivating fans since 1977 - and our LEGO® Star Wars minifigures bring that galaxy far, far away right to your collection. From legendary Jedi like Luke Skywalker, Obi-Wan Kenobi, and Yoda to infamous Sith Lords like Darth Vader, Darth Maul, and Emperor Palpatine, every character tells a story. Build your army with clone troopers, stormtroopers, and rebel soldiers, or collect beloved droids like R2-D2™, C-3PO™, and BB-8. Our Star Wars minifigures span the Original Trilogy, Prequel Trilogy, Sequel Trilogy, and beyond - including characters from The Mandalorian™, Andor™, Ahsoka™, The Clone Wars™, and The Bad Batch™. Whether you're hunting for rare variants or building your ultimate Star Wars display, these minifigures capture every detail from the movies and shows that defined generations.
Harry Potter: Step into the magical world of Harry Potter™ with LEGO® minifigures that bring Hogwarts™ to life. Collect Harry, Ron, and Hermione throughout their years at school, from first-year students to battle-ready wizards. Build your collection with iconic professors like Dumbledore, McGonagall, and Snape, or add dark wizards like Voldemort and the Death Eaters. Our Harry Potter minifigures feature beloved characters from all eight films, including fan favorites like Dobby, Hagrid, Luna Lovegood, and Neville Longbottom. From Quidditch players in their house robes to Triwizard Tournament champions, each minifigure captures the magic and detail that makes the wizarding world so enchanting. Perfect for fans of all ages who want to recreate their favorite scenes or create new magical adventures.
Super Heroes: Assemble the ultimate superhero collection with LEGO® Marvel and DC Super Heroes minifigures! From the Avengers to the Justice League, collect legendary heroes like Spider-Man, Iron Man, Captain America, Batman, Superman, and Wonder Woman. Face off against notorious villains including Thanos, The Joker, Lex Luthor, and Green Goblin. Our Super Heroes collection spans the entire Marvel Cinematic Universe and DC Extended Universe, featuring characters from blockbuster movies, classic comic books, and hit TV shows. Whether you're building the Infinity War saga, creating epic Batman vs Superman battles, or assembling your own superhero team, these detailed minifigures bring the action and excitement of superhero adventures right to your fingertips.
NINJAGO: Master the art of Spinjitzu with LEGO® NINJAGO® minifigures! Join Kai, Jay, Cole, Zane, Lloyd, and Nya as they battle against the forces of evil threatening Ninjago City. From classic ninja training robes to advanced techno suits, collect dozens of variants for each ninja as they evolve through multiple seasons of adventures. Face legendary villains like Lord Garmadon, the Serpentine tribes, the Overlord, and the Skulkin army. Our NINJAGO collection includes minifigures from all seasons of the hit TV show, The LEGO NINJAGO Movie, and exclusive tournament fighters. With elemental powers, ancient weapons, and modern vehicles, these ninjas are ready for any battle. Perfect for fans who want to recreate epic showdowns or create their own Spinjitzu adventures.
Friends: Welcome to Heartlake City with LEGO® Friends minifigures! Follow the adventures of Andrea, Emma, Mia, Olivia, and Stephanie as they navigate friendship, creativity, and fun in their vibrant community. From beach days and camping trips to music performances and pet rescues, these mini-dolls capture every moment of friendship and adventure. Our Friends collection has evolved over the years, introducing new characters and celebrating diversity, ensuring every builder can see themselves in Heartlake City. Whether you're building the perfect treehouse, running a café, or caring for animals at the rescue center, LEGO Friends minifigures bring stories of kindness, creativity, and friendship to life.
City: Experience everyday adventures with LEGO® City minifigures! From brave firefighters and police officers to astronauts and construction workers, LEGO City captures the excitement of real-world jobs and adventures. Collect coast guard rescue teams, emergency responders, pizza delivery drivers, and everyone in between. Our City collection features minifigures representing diverse careers and lifestyles, from bustling downtown workers to mountain rescue teams and deep-sea explorers. With over four decades of iconic designs, LEGO City minifigures let builders of all ages create their own modern metropolis. Whether you're fighting fires, solving crimes, or exploring the Arctic, these minifigures bring the excitement of urban life and adventure to your collection.
Minecraft: Build, craft, and explore the blocky world of Minecraft® with LEGO® minifigures! From Steve and Alex to zombies, creepers, and endermen, bring your favorite Minecraft characters into the real world. Collect villagers, piglins, skeletons, and all the mobs that make Minecraft adventures unforgettable. Our Minecraft minifigures feature the same cubic design as the game, perfectly capturing the iconic blocky aesthetic while adding LEGO building possibilities. Battle the Ender Dragon, explore the Nether, or build your dream base with these detailed character figures. Perfect for Minecraft players who want to bring their digital adventures into physical building experiences, combining two beloved worlds of creativity and imagination.
Disney: Enter the magical world of Disney™ with LEGO® Disney minifigures! Collect beloved princesses like Elsa, Anna, Ariel, Belle, and Cinderella, along with classic characters like Mickey Mouse, Minnie Mouse, Donald Duck, and Goofy. Our Disney collection spans generations of storytelling, from timeless classics to modern favorites like Moana, Raya, and characters from Encanto. Build fairy tale castles with Frozen characters, sail the seas with Moana, or recreate magical moments with Disney Princesses. These minifigures capture the charm, magic, and wonder that Disney brings to audiences worldwide. Perfect for young builders and Disney fans who want to create their own happily ever afters.
Jurassic World: Life finds a way with LEGO® Jurassic World™ minifigures! Collect fearless dinosaur trainers like Owen Grady and Claire Dearing as they navigate the dangerous world of prehistoric creatures. From park scientists to InGen personnel, our Jurassic World collection features characters from all six films spanning the Jurassic Park and Jurassic World franchises. While the dinosaurs steal the show, these brave minifigures are ready to study, rescue, or escape from these magnificent creatures. Whether you're recreating the classic Jurassic Park gates or building modern Jurassic World adventures, these detailed minifigures bring 65 million years of history to life. Perfect for dinosaur enthusiasts and action-adventure fans of all ages.
Collectible Minifigures: Discover unique characters with LEGO® Collectible Minifigures! Since 2010, these mystery bag series have delivered quirky, creative, and surprising characters you won't find anywhere else. From astronauts and knights to hot dog vendors and unicorn guys, each series brings 12-16 unique minifigures with exclusive accessories and designs. Collect fan-favorite themes like Marvel, DC, Disney, The LEGO Movie, Harry Potter, and The Simpsons, or explore original characters that spark imagination. With over 30 series and 500+ unique figures released, the Collectible Minifigures line celebrates creativity, humor, and endless possibilities. Perfect for collectors hunting for rare figures or builders looking to add unique characters to their LEGO world.
Castle: Defend the kingdom with LEGO® Castle minifigures! From the classic Yellow Castle knights of 1978 to the elaborate factions of modern Castle themes, these medieval warriors have been battling for honor and glory for over four decades. Collect brave knights in shining armor, mysterious forestmen, fearsome Black Falcons, noble Lion Knights, and evil Dark Knights. Face off against skeleton armies, trolls, and dragons in epic medieval battles. Our Castle collection spans Black Knights, Crusaders, Royal Knights, Dragon Masters, and many more factions, each with unique colors, crests, and battle strategies. These timeless minifigures capture the adventure, chivalry, and fantasy that make medieval stories unforgettable.
Pirates: Set sail for adventure with LEGO® Pirates minifigures! From classic Pirates of 1989 to modern-day buccaneers, these swashbuckling characters have been hunting treasure and battling on the high seas for decades. Collect brave Imperial Guards defending their forts, cunning pirates with eye patches and peg legs, and island natives protecting their homes. Our Pirates collection features notorious captains, loyal crew members, mysterious mermaids, and fearsome skeletons. Whether you're defending treasure islands, engaging in naval battles, or searching for buried gold, these detailed minifigures bring the golden age of piracy to life. Perfect for adventurers who love tales of the seven seas and hidden treasure.
Space: Blast off to adventure with classic LEGO® Space minifigures! Since 1978, these pioneering astronauts have been exploring the cosmos, establishing bases on alien worlds, and encountering mysterious civilizations. Collect colorful space teams including Classic Space (white, red, yellow, blue), Blacktron, M-Tron, Space Police, Ice Planet 2002, Spyrius, and Insectoids. Each faction brings unique uniforms, vehicles, and missions to the final frontier. From peaceful explorers to space police chasing smugglers, these retro-futuristic minifigures capture the optimism and excitement of space exploration. Perfect for nostalgic builders and anyone who dreams of adventures among the stars with classic LEGO charm.
Technic: Experience engineering excellence with LEGO® Technic minifigures! While Technic sets focus on mechanical complexity and realistic functions, the minifigures represent skilled operators, pit crews, drivers, and technicians. These specialized figures often feature detailed racing suits, work uniforms, and professional gear. From Formula 1 drivers to construction equipment operators, Technic minifigures showcase the human element behind incredible machines. Though less common than traditional themes, these figures celebrate engineering, mechanics, and the people who operate complex machinery. Perfect for builders who appreciate technical excellence and want to add realistic scale and context to their Technic vehicle and machine collections.
The LEGO Movie: Everything is awesome with The LEGO® Movie™ minifigures! Join Emmet, Wyldstyle/Lucy, Batman, Unikitty, Benny, and MetalBeard as they fight to save the LEGO universe from Lord Business. Our LEGO Movie collection celebrates creativity, imagination, and the idea that anyone can be special. Collect heroes from Bricksburg, Cloud Cuckoo Land, and the Wild West, plus villains like Lord Business and his robot armies. These minifigures capture the humor, heart, and action of the hit animated films, from Master Builders to everyday citizens. Whether you're building to save the world or just having fun, these characters remind us that creativity has no limits.
Town: Experience everyday life with classic LEGO® Town minifigures! The predecessor to LEGO City, Town sets captured ordinary community life from 1978 through 2004. Collect police officers, firefighters, construction workers, doctors, shop owners, and regular citizens going about their daily lives. From gas station attendants to pizza delivery drivers, these minifigures represent the heart of any LEGO community. Town themes like Main Street, Paradisa, and Extreme Team showcase different eras of LEGO design philosophy. These nostalgic figures remind us that LEGO isn't just about fantasy - it's about celebrating the people and places that make communities thrive.
Creator: Unleash unlimited creativity with LEGO® Creator minifigures! This diverse theme encourages builders to create anything they can imagine, from buildings and vehicles to creatures and fantasy worlds. Creator minifigures reflect this versatility, including pilots, adventurers, surfers, race car drivers, and everyday people. With 3-in-1 sets offering multiple building options, these figures can be astronauts one moment and jungle explorers the next. The Creator line celebrates imagination without boundaries, giving builders the freedom to tell any story. Perfect for builders who love flexibility and want minifigures that fit any adventure they can dream up.
Dimensions: Break the boundaries between worlds with LEGO® Dimensions minifigures! This groundbreaking toys-to-life video game brought together characters from across pop culture universes. Collect Batman, Gandalf, Wyldstyle, Sonic the Hedgehog, Homer Simpson, Scooby-Doo, and dozens of other iconic characters - all meeting in one game. Each minifigure came with unique abilities and vehicles that transported between digital and physical play. While the game ended in 2017, these crossover minifigures remain beloved for bringing together franchises that would never normally meet. A unique moment in LEGO history where anything was possible and every character could be friends.
Monkie Kid: Discover ancient legends with LEGO® Monkie Kid™! Inspired by the classic Chinese tale Journey to the West, follow MK (Monkie Kid) as he discovers his destiny and battles the powerful Demon Bull King. Collect heroes like Mei, Pigsy, Mr. Tang, and Sandy, plus legendary figures like the Monkey King himself. Face off against villains like Macaque, Spider Queen, and the sinister Lady Bone Demon. This theme blends Chinese mythology with modern city life, creating a unique world of adventure. With detailed minifigures featuring beautiful printed designs and accessories inspired by traditional Chinese culture, Monkie Kid brings timeless legends to new generations.
Hidden Side: Hunt ghosts in LEGO® Hidden Side™! This innovative theme combines physical building with augmented reality ghost hunting through a mobile app. Collect paranormal investigators Jack Davids and Parker L. Jackson as they explore the haunted town of Newbury. Battle ghosts, possessed objects, and supernatural forces while uncovering the mystery behind the Hidden Side. Though the theme ended in 2020, these unique minifigures feature glow-in-the-dark elements and reversible heads showing ghostly possession. Hidden Side pushed LEGO into new territory, blending physical and digital play in exciting ways. Perfect for ghost hunters and anyone who loves mysteries with a supernatural twist.
Sonic the Hedgehog: Gotta go fast with LEGO® Sonic the Hedgehog™ minifigures! Speed through Green Hill Zone with Sonic, Tails, Amy Rose, and their friends as they battle the evil Dr. Eggman and his robot army. Collect iconic characters from SEGA's legendary franchise, including fan favorites and fearsome badniks like Buzz Bomber, Crabmeat, and Newtron. These minifigures capture the vibrant energy and attitude that made Sonic a gaming icon since 1991. From loop-de-loops to chaos emeralds, bring the high-speed action of Sonic games into your LEGO world. Perfect for retro gamers and new fans alike who love adventure, speed, and classic platforming action with attitude.
LEGENDS OF CHIMA: Enter the mystical animal kingdom with LEGO® LEGENDS OF CHIMA™ minifigures! In this fantastical world, anthropomorphic animals battle for control of the powerful CHI energy. Collect warriors from noble tribes like the Lions led by Laval, Crocodiles under Cragger, Eagles with Eris, Wolves with Worriz, Ravens, Gorillas, and Bears. Face sinister villains from the Ice Tribes and legendary creatures. Each minifigure features incredible detail with animal heads, armor, weapons, and tribal markings. With complex alliances, betrayals, and epic battles, Chima delivers rich storytelling and stunning character designs. Perfect for fans of fantasy, animals, and action-packed adventures in a unique LEGO universe.
Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Heroes in a half shell, LEGO® Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles™ minifigures bring turtle power to your collection! Join Leonardo, Raphael, Michelangelo, and Donatello as they protect New York City from the Shredder and the Foot Clan. Collect fan-favorite characters including Master Splinter, April O'Neil, Casey Jones, and villains like The Kraang, Dogpound, and Baxter Stockman. These minifigures capture the personality and attitude of each turtle brother, from Leo's leadership to Mikey's party dude energy. With detailed masks, weapons, and expressions, recreate classic sewer battles and rooftop showdowns. Perfect for TMNT fans who grew up on pizza, nunchucks, and cowabunga adventures.
The Simpsons: D'oh! Welcome to Springfield with LEGO® The Simpsons™ minifigures! America's favorite animated family comes to LEGO with Homer, Marge, Bart, Lisa, and Maggie, plus the entire cast of quirky neighbors and townspeople. Collect Mr. Burns, Smithers, Ned Flanders, Apu, Chief Wiggum, Krusty the Clown, Moe, and dozens more iconic characters. Available through Collectible Minifigure series and the legendary Simpsons House set, these yellow-skinned figures perfectly capture the show's humor and heart. From the Kwik-E-Mart to the nuclear power plant, build Springfield one minifigure at a time. Perfect for fans of television's longest-running sitcom who love satire, donuts, and animated chaos.
SpongeBob SquarePants: Are you ready? LEGO® SpongeBob SquarePants™ minifigures bring Bikini Bottom to life! Join SpongeBob, Patrick, Squidward, Mr. Krabs, Sandy, and all your favorite underwater friends on wacky adventures beneath the sea. Collect characters in various expressions and outfits, from SpongeBob's classic optimistic grin to his shocked look and tongue-out concentration. These minifigures capture the absurd humor and heart that made SpongeBob a cultural phenomenon since 1999. Whether you're working at the Krusty Krab, jellyfishing in Jellyfish Fields, or causing chaos at the Chum Bucket, these figures bring nautical nonsense to your LEGO world. Perfect for fans who live in a pineapple under the sea.
Avatar: Experience the wonder of Pandora with LEGO® Avatar™ minifigures! Based on James Cameron's groundbreaking films, collect Na'vi warriors, human scientists, and RDA soldiers from the world of Avatar and Avatar: The Way of Water. These minifigures feature stunning detail including Na'vi anatomy, tribal markings, and distinctive features. Build your connection with Pandora's ecosystem and recreate epic battles between the Na'vi clans and human forces. From forest dwellers to reef people, each figure represents the rich cultures and biodiversity of Pandora. Perfect for fans of epic science fiction, environmental storytelling, and the visually stunning world that redefined cinema.
Avatar The Last Airbender: Master the four elements with LEGO® Avatar: The Last Airbender™ minifigures! Join Aang, Katara, Sokka, Toph, and Zuko on their journey to restore balance to the world. Collect heroes from the Water Tribe, Earth Kingdom, Fire Nation, and Air Nomads, each with unique bending abilities and cultural designs. Face villains like Fire Lord Ozai, Princess Azula, and the Dai Li. These minifigures bring to life one of animation's most beloved series with detailed expressions, costumes, and accessories. From flying bison to fire nation warships, recreate iconic moments from the show. Perfect for fans of martial arts, Eastern philosophy, and epic coming-of-age adventures.
DREAMZzz: Dream bigger with LEGO® DREAMZzz™ minifigures! This imaginative theme brings the dream world to life where anything is possible. Follow Mateo, Izzie, Cooper, Logan, and Zoey as they enter the dream realm and face off against the Nightmare King and his dark forces. These minifigures feature unique designs that transform between real world and dream world versions, encouraging creative storytelling. Build fantastical creatures, impossible vehicles, and surreal environments limited only by imagination. With story-driven building and multiple build options, DREAMZzz celebrates creativity and the power of dreams. Perfect for young builders who love fantasy, friendship, and thinking outside the box.
Fortnite: Drop into the Battle Royale with LEGO® Fortnite™ minifigures! Based on the global gaming phenomenon, collect iconic skins and characters from Fortnite's ever-evolving world. From default skins to legendary outfits, these minifigures capture the game's distinctive art style and personality. Build Battle Bus encounters, construct defense structures, and recreate Victory Royales with detailed figures featuring back bling, pickaxes, and weapons. Whether you're a pro player or casual fan, these minifigures bring Fortnite's colorful chaos from screen to brick. Perfect for gamers who love building, battling, and expressing their unique style through cosmetic customization.
One Piece: Set sail for the Grand Line with LEGO® One Piece™ minifigures! Join Monkey D. Luffy and the Straw Hat Pirates on their quest to find the legendary treasure. Collect Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Sanji, Chopper, Robin, Franky, Brook, and Jinbe, each with signature abilities and personality. These minifigures bring Eiichiro Oda's beloved manga and anime to LEGO with distinctive character designs, pirate ships, and adventures. From Devil Fruit powers to sword techniques, recreate epic battles and emotional moments from one of the world's best-selling manga series. Perfect for anime fans who dream of adventure, treasure, and the power of friendship on the high seas.
Super Mario: It's-a me, LEGO® Super Mario™! Jump into the Mushroom Kingdom with interactive minifigures featuring Mario, Luigi, Princess Peach, and their friends. These innovative figures combine traditional LEGO building with digital play, featuring LCD screens, speakers, and sensors that react to colors and barcodes. Collect enemies like Goombas, Koopa Troopas, Boo, and Bowser, plus power-ups and iconic course elements. Build custom levels, collect coins, and defeat villains just like the classic video games. With expansion sets covering multiple Mario games and series, create infinite platforming adventures. Perfect for Nintendo fans who grew up jumping, stomping, and collecting stars in gaming's most iconic franchise.
The Legend of Zelda: It's dangerous to go alone! LEGO® The Legend of Zelda™ minifigures bring Hyrule to life. Collect Link in his iconic green tunic, Princess Zelda, and face the dark power of Ganondorf. These minifigures celebrate one of gaming's most legendary franchises with detailed designs inspired by decades of adventures. From the Master Sword to the Triforce, build iconic locations and epic boss battles. Whether exploring dungeons, solving puzzles, or saving Hyrule, these figures honor the spirit of adventure that made Zelda a cornerstone of gaming history. Perfect for fans who've grown up with Link's quest to defeat evil and restore peace to the kingdom.
Adventurers: Explore lost civilizations with LEGO® Adventurers™ minifigures! This classic theme from the late 1990s and early 2000s followed Johnny Thunder and his team on globe-trotting adventures. Journey through Egyptian deserts, dense jungles, dinosaur islands, and Orient expeditions. Collect heroes like Johnny Thunder, Pippin Reed, Dr. Kilroy, and face villains like Sam Sinister and Baron von Barron. These minifigures defined adventure themes with fedoras, safari gear, and treasure-hunting equipment. Indiana Jones before Indiana Jones, Adventurers captured the spirit of pulp adventure serials. Perfect for nostalgic builders who love archaeology, exploration, and hunting for ancient treasures in dangerous temples.
Agents: Covert operations begin with LEGO® Agents™ minifigures! This spy-themed series featured elite agents battling the criminal organization led by Dr. Inferno. Collect high-tech secret agents with gadgets, vehicles, and advanced technology as they thwart evil schemes. These minifigures combined espionage, action, and science fiction in sleek modern designs. From underwater bases to volcanic lairs, agents faced impossible odds with style and sophistication. Though short-lived (2008-2009), Agents delivered James Bond-style excitement with LEGO creativity. Perfect for fans of spy thrillers, secret missions, and saving the world with gadgets, vehicles, and teamwork.
Alpha Team: Elite special forces save the world with LEGO® Alpha Team™ minifigures! This early 2000s theme featured a highly trained team battling the evil ogre Ogel and his mind-control orbs. Collect team members Dash Justice, Flex, Charge, Crunch, and Radia across multiple missions including deep freeze polar expeditions and deep sea underwater operations. These minifigures featured distinctive color-coded uniforms and specialized equipment for extreme environments. From snowmobiles to submarines, Alpha Team combined military action with sci-fi elements. Perfect for fans of elite tactical teams, world-saving missions, and stopping villains with specialized gear and vehicles.
Aquazone: Dive deep with LEGO® Aquazone™ minifigures! This underwater theme from the mid-1990s featured rival factions battling beneath the waves. Collect Aquanauts in orange and black, Aquasharks in dark green and red, Hydronauts in yellow and blue, and Stingrays. Each faction featured unique diving suits, submarines, and underwater bases. These minifigures pioneered underwater LEGO adventures with detailed helmets, breathing apparatus, and aquatic vehicles. From crystal hunting to territorial battles, Aquazone delivered sci-fi submarine action. Perfect for nostalgic fans who dreamed of underwater cities, deep sea exploration, and submarine battles in mysterious ocean depths.
Architecture: Celebrate architectural excellence with LEGO® Architecture™ minifigures! While this theme focuses primarily on landmark buildings and skylines, limited minifigures represent architects and professionals. These sophisticated figures accompany sets featuring world-famous structures like the Eiffel Tower, Empire State Building, and Taj Mahal. Architecture minifigures showcase professional attire and contemporary design sensibilities. Though sparse, they add human scale and context to architectural masterpieces. Perfect for adult builders, architecture enthusiasts, and anyone who appreciates design, engineering, and the buildings that define our cities and cultures.
Atlantis: Discover the lost city with LEGO® Atlantis™ minifigures! This underwater adventure theme (2010-2011) featured explorers seeking the legendary underwater civilization. Collect deep-sea divers in red suits with advanced diving equipment, and face mysterious Atlantis warriors with fish-like features and ancient weapons. Find treasure keys, battle sea monsters, and uncover ancient secrets in submarines and underwater vehicles. These minifigures combined exploration with mystery, bringing the Atlantis legend to LEGO. Though brief, Atlantis delivered exciting underwater adventures and mythological intrigue. Perfect for fans of lost civilizations, underwater exploration, and ancient mysteries waiting to be discovered in the ocean depths.
Back to the Future: Great Scott! LEGO® Back to the Future™ minifigures bring time travel adventures to life! Collect Marty McFly and Doc Brown from the classic film trilogy. These highly detailed minifigures capture the iconic looks from different time periods - 1985, 1955, 2015, and the Wild West. Available through LEGO Dimensions and LEGO Ideas sets, these figures come with the legendary DeLorean time machine. From the clock tower to the Enchantment Under the Sea dance, recreate movie moments that defined pop culture. Perfect for fans of time travel, 1980s nostalgia, and one of cinema's most beloved science fiction adventures.
BIONICLE: Unite Duty, Destiny! LEGO® BIONICLE® minifigures represent a unique chapter in LEGO history. While primarily a constraction (construction-action) theme with buildable figures, BIONICLE included small minifigure-scale characters. Collect heroes like the Toa - warriors with elemental powers protecting the island of Mata Nui. Face villains like the Piraka, Barraki, and Visorak. BIONICLE featured deep mythology, Polynesian-inspired designs, and an epic storyline spanning 2001-2010. These rare minifigures complemented the larger buildable figures, offering a different scale for the rich BIONICLE universe. Perfect for fans of the legendary saga that defined 2000s LEGO with heroes, masks of power, and an unforgettable mythology.
Belville: Enter a world of fairy tales with LEGO® Belville™ minifigures! This theme (1994-2009) targeted young girls with larger figures, pastel colors, and fantasy storytelling. Collect princesses, fairies, and magical characters in detailed dresses and accessories. While predating Friends, Belville pioneered LEGO's approach to themes with fantasy, fashion, and friendship. These figures featured more detailed hair, clothing, and accessories than standard minifigures. From castles to magical gardens, Belville delivered enchanted adventures. Though discontinued, Belville figures remain nostalgic for fans who grew up building fairy tale kingdoms and magical worlds with distinctive LEGO figures designed for imaginative storytelling.
Bluey: It's playtime with LEGO® Bluey™! Based on the Australian animated sensation, collect Bluey, Bingo, Bandit, and Chilli from the beloved children's series. These minifigures capture the heart and humor of the Heeler family's imaginative games and everyday adventures. Build the Heeler house, go on camping trips, and recreate episodes that resonate with families worldwide. From Keepy Uppy to Dance Mode, these figures celebrate play, parenting, and family bonds. DUPLO and standard LEGO sets bring Bluey's world to life for young builders. Perfect for families who love the show's warmth, creativity, and celebration of childhood imagination.
Cars: Start your engines with LEGO® Cars™ minifigures! Based on Pixar's animated films Cars, Cars 2, and Cars 3, collect Lightning McQueen, Mater, Sally, Doc Hudson, and the entire Radiator Springs crew. While primarily brick-built car models, some sets include humanoid pit crew and race official minifigures. These figures complement the racing action and bring the Piston Cup excitement to life. From international espionage in Cars 2 to next-gen racing in Cars 3, recreate movie moments and race adventures. Perfect for young Pixar fans who love racing, friendship, and the heartwarming story of a race car learning what truly matters.
Dino: Hunt prehistoric creatures with LEGO® Dino™ minifigures! This 2012 theme featured a team of modern explorers and scientists tracking dinosaurs with advanced technology. Collect rugged adventurers with tracking equipment, tranquilizer guns, and off-road vehicles as they study and contain escaped dinosaurs. These minifigures wore detailed exploration gear with orange and dark green color schemes. From T-Rex to Triceratops encounters, Dino combined paleontology with action-adventure. Though a single-year theme, Dino delivered exciting dinosaur action with contemporary characters. Perfect for dinosaur fans who love modern-day expeditions, scientific exploration, and the thrill of encountering living prehistoric predators.
Dino Attack: Mutant dinosaurs threaten humanity in LEGO® Dino Attack™ minifigures! This apocalyptic 2005 theme (Dino 2010 in Europe) featured military teams battling mutant reptiles with futuristic weapons and vehicles. Collect soldiers in distinctive black, orange, and lime green uniforms with advanced armaments. These minifigures fought genetically altered dinosaurs in post-apocalyptic settings. Darker and more militaristic than typical LEGO themes, Dino Attack delivered intense action and sci-fi horror elements. Though controversial for its aggressive tone, it remains memorable for fans of military sci-fi and dinosaur action. Perfect for collectors who appreciate unique, darker LEGO themes with end-of-the-world stakes.
Exo-Force: Pilot giant mechs with LEGO® Exo-Force™ minifigures! This anime-inspired theme (2006-2008) featured young pilots defending Sentai Mountain from evil robots. Collect heroes like Hikaru, Takeshi, Ryo, and Ha-Ya-To alongside villain Meca One and robot forces. These minifigures featured manga-style designs with distinctive hair and Japanese-influenced aesthetics. From battling machines to hovering fortresses, Exo-Force combined mecha anime with LEGO building. Each figure piloted customizable battle machines in a continuing storyline. Though short-lived, Exo-Force remains beloved by fans of anime, robots, and the unique fusion of LEGO with Japanese pop culture.
Fabuland: Enter a gentle animal world with LEGO® Fabuland™ minifigures! This 1979-1989 theme featured anthropomorphic animal characters for young children. Collect friendly characters like Max Mouse, Edward Elephant, Bonnie Bunny, and dozens more animals living in a peaceful community. These larger figures with single-piece bodies predated modern minifigures, designed for small hands. Fabuland told simple stories about everyday life, work, and friendship in a colorful animal town. Though discontinued, Fabuland remains nostalgic for fans who grew up with these charming characters. Perfect for vintage LEGO collectors and parents who remember the gentle, character-driven storytelling of this classic early theme.
Ghostbusters: Who you gonna call? LEGO® Ghostbusters™ minifigures! Capture spooks and specters with Peter Venkman, Ray Stantz, Egon Spengler, and Winston Zeddemore. These highly detailed figures feature the iconic tan jumpsuits, proton packs, and ghost-catching equipment from the classic 1984 film and its sequels. Collect supporting characters like Janine Melnitz and face off against ghosts, including the unforgettable Stay Puft Marshmallow Man. From the Ecto-1 to the firehouse headquarters, recreate paranormal investigations and supernatural showdowns. Perfect for fans of the beloved comedy franchise who ain't afraid of no ghost and want to build the ultimate ghost-busting team.
Elves: Discover magic in Elvendale with LEGO® Elves™ minifigures! This fantasy theme (2015-2018) followed Emily Jones as she entered the magical elf world. Collect elemental elves like Azari (fire), Naida (water), Farran (earth), and Aira (air), plus the mysterious Rosalyn Nightshade and the evil Goblin King. These mini-doll figures featured colorful fantasy designs, pointed ears, and magical accessories. Build treehouses, castles, and workshops in a vibrant fantasy realm. With dragons, pegasi, and enchanted forests, Elves delivered magical adventures and friendship themes. Perfect for fans of fantasy, magic, elemental powers, and colorful worlds filled with wonder and imagination.
Gabby's Dollhouse: Come inside with LEGO® Gabby's Dollhouse™! Based on the DreamWorks animated series, shrink down to kitty size with Gabby and her cat friends. Collect Gabby, Pandy Paws, Cakey Cat, MerCat, DJ Catnip, and all the adorable characters from the show's colorful rooms. These DUPLO and standard LEGO figures bring preschool creativity and kindness to life. Build themed rooms, solve problems with kindness, and celebrate imagination. Perfect for young builders who love the show's positive messages, cute cats, and the magic of creative play in a dollhouse world where anything is possible.
Horizon: Hunt mechanical beasts in a post-apocalyptic world with LEGO® Horizon™ minifigures! Based on PlayStation's acclaimed video game series, collect Aloy and other tribal hunters from Horizon Forbidden West and LEGO Horizon Adventures. These minifigures feature detailed tribal gear, weapons, and accessories from the games' unique blend of primitive culture and advanced technology. Face mechanical dinosaurs and uncover ancient secrets in a far-future Earth. With stunning visual designs and epic adventures, Horizon brings PlayStation gaming to LEGO building. Perfect for gamers who love exploration, robot dinosaurs, and post-apocalyptic worlds where nature and technology collide in spectacular fashion.
Indiana Jones: Adventure awaits with LEGO® Indiana Jones™ minifigures! Recreate classic film moments with Professor Henry Jones Jr. in his iconic fedora, leather jacket, and whip. Collect Indy across multiple films - Raiders of the Lost Ark, Temple of Doom, Last Crusade, and Kingdom of the Crystal Skull. Face villains like René Belloq, Major Toht, Mola Ram, and Irina Spalko. These minifigures capture the pulp adventure spirit with detailed printing and accessories. From the golden idol to the Holy Grail, seek ancient artifacts while dodging traps and enemies. Perfect for fans of classic adventure films, archaeology, and the archaeologist who belongs in a museum.
Lightyear: To infinity and beyond with LEGO® Lightyear™ minifigures! Based on the Pixar film exploring Buzz Lightyear's origin story, collect Space Ranger Buzz, his team, and the menacing Zurg. These minifigures feature sci-fi space suits, advanced technology, and futuristic designs. While inspired by Toy Story's Buzz, Lightyear tells the real story of the space hero. Build starships, explore alien planets, and battle robots in epic space adventures. Though a standalone Pixar film, these figures connect to the beloved Toy Story universe. Perfect for Pixar fans who want to explore the heroic origins of everyone's favorite Space Ranger.
Monster Fighters: Vanquish the undead with LEGO® Monster Fighters™ minifigures! This 2012 horror-themed series featured Victorian-era heroes battling classic movie monsters. Collect vampire hunters, scientists, and fighters facing Count Dracula, werewolves, mummies, zombies, ghosts, and Frankenstein's monster. Led by the intrepid Dr. Rodney Rathbone and his team, these heroes used moonstone power to defeat Lord Vampyre's evil plan to block out the sun. With gothic architecture, monsters, and steampunk technology, Monster Fighters delivered Halloween excitement year-round. Perfect for fans of classic Universal monsters, gothic horror, and Victorian-era supernatural adventures with LEGO creativity.
NEXO KNIGHTS: Download hero powers with LEGO® NEXO KNIGHTS™ minifigures! This futuristic medieval theme (2016-2018) combined knights with digital technology. Collect Clay Moorington, Lance Richmond, Aaron Fox, Macy Halbert, and Axl as they defend the kingdom of Knighton from Jestro and his Book of Monsters. These minifigures featured detailed armor, shields with scannable NEXO Powers, and modern-medieval designs. Battle lava monsters, stone monsters, and digital villains with downloadable abilities via the NEXO KNIGHTS app. Blending fantasy, technology, and gaming, this theme pushed LEGO innovation. Perfect for fans who love knights, robots, and the fusion of medieval valor with futuristic technology.
Overwatch: Heroes never die! LEGO® Overwatch™ minifigures bring Blizzard's team-based shooter to brick form. Collect iconic heroes like Tracer, Soldier: 76, Widowmaker, Reaper, D.Va, Winston, Genji, Hanzo, and more. These highly detailed figures capture each character's unique design, abilities, and personality from the game. Build payload escorts, control points, and iconic maps with LEGO sets featuring recognizable Overwatch locations. Though a limited run (2019-2020), these minifigures delivered game-accurate details for Overwatch fans. Perfect for players who main their favorite heroes and want to build the ultimate team composition in LEGO form.
Pharaoh's Quest: Uncover ancient curses with LEGO® Pharaoh's Quest™ minifigures! This 2011 adventure theme featured modern explorers awakening an ancient Egyptian pharaoh and his mummy army. Collect Professor Archibald Hale and his team as they race to collect golden treasures before the mummies claim them. Face the Golden King, mummy warriors, flying mummies, and scarab creatures. These minifigures combined Adventurers-style exploration with supernatural horror. With hidden treasures, cursed artifacts, and desert expeditions, Pharaoh's Quest delivered Egyptian mythology and adventure. Perfect for fans of archaeology, ancient Egypt, mummies, and the dangers of disturbing tombs that should remain sealed forever.
Power Miners: Drill deep with LEGO® Power Miners™ minifigures! This 2009-2010 underground adventure theme featured miners excavating energy crystals while battling rock monsters. Collect the Power Miners team in distinctive orange and yellow mining gear with advanced drilling equipment and vehicles. Face rock monsters from the planet's core who eat energy crystals. These minifigures featured unique drilling tools, helmets with lights, and rugged explorer designs. From drill dozers to thunder drills, battle underground creatures in vast caverns. Power Miners combined geology, sci-fi, and adventure. Perfect for fans of underground exploration, mining, monsters, and digging to the center of the Earth.
Prince of Persia: Rewind time with LEGO® Prince of Persia™ minifigures! Based on the 2010 film adaptation, collect Prince Dastan, Princess Tamina, and warriors from ancient Persia. These minifigures feature detailed Middle Eastern costumes, curved weapons, and accessories including the time-manipulating Dagger of Time. Build desert fortresses, engage in palace intrigue, and recreate parkour-style action sequences. Though a single-year tie-in theme, Prince of Persia delivered elaborate sets and detailed figures from Disney's fantasy adventure film. Perfect for fans of Arabian Nights-style adventures, time manipulation, and the Prince of Persia video game franchise that inspired the movie.
Rock Raiders: Mine the underground with LEGO® Rock Raiders™ minifigures! This 1999-2000 theme featured a stranded mining crew exploring an alien planet's cave systems. Collect the Rock Raiders team in distinctive yellow and blue mining suits with drilling equipment and vehicles. Mine energy crystals while avoiding rock monsters, cave-ins, and underground hazards. These minifigures pioneered underground exploration themes with unique tools and vehicles. From chromestone to energy crystals, extract resources while battling slimy rock monsters. Rock Raiders combined resource management gameplay with LEGO building. Perfect for fans of underground exploration, mining operations, and surviving hostile alien environments deep beneath the surface.
Scooby-Doo: Zoinks! Solve mysteries with LEGO® Scooby-Doo™ minifigures! Join the Mystery Inc. gang - Scooby-Doo, Shaggy, Fred, Daphne, and Velma - as they unmask villains in the Mystery Machine. These minifigures capture the classic Hanna-Barbera character designs from 50+ years of mystery solving. Collect monsters like the Black Knight, Zombie, Mummy, Ghost, and Witch, then reveal the person underneath. Build haunted mansions, spooky lighthouses, and creepy locations. Scooby and Shaggy's cowardly reactions and appetite for Scooby Snacks shine through. Perfect for fans who grew up solving mysteries, chasing ghosts, and would have gotten away with it if not for those meddling kids!
Stranger Things: Turn it upside down with LEGO® Stranger Things™ minifigures! Based on Netflix's hit sci-fi horror series, collect Eleven, Mike, Dustin, Lucas, Will, Joyce, and Hopper from the nostalgic 1980s-set show. The massive Stranger Things set features the Byers house in normal and Upside Down versions with incredible detail. These minifigures capture the show's characters with period-accurate 1980s clothing, hairstyles, and accessories. Face the Demogorgon and explore the supernatural mysteries of Hawkins, Indiana. Perfect for fans of 1980s nostalgia, supernatural mysteries, Dungeons & Dragons, and the beloved coming-of-age horror series that captivated audiences worldwide.
The Angry Birds Movie: Slingshot into action with LEGO® The Angry Birds Movie™ minifigures! Based on the mobile game franchise and animated films, collect Red, Chuck, Bomb, Matilda, Terence, and the Bad Piggies. These minifigures translate the round, expressive birds into LEGO form with unique building techniques for their spherical shapes. Build Piggy City, Bird Island, and launch birds at structures just like the game. Though a brief theme (2016), these figures brought the addictive mobile gaming phenomenon to physical building. Perfect for fans of the games who've spent countless hours launching birds at pigs and toppling elaborate structures.
The Goonies: Goonies never say die! LEGO® The Goonies™ minifigures celebrate the classic 1985 adventure film. Collect Mikey, Chunk, Mouth, Data, Brand, Andy, and Stef as they search for One-Eyed Willy's treasure. Face the Fratellis - Ma, Francis, and Jake - plus the lovable Sloth. Available through LEGO Ideas, this detailed set captures the movie's iconic pirate ship and treasure-hunting adventure. These minifigures bring 1980s nostalgia and childhood adventure to life with period-accurate clothing and accessories. Perfect for fans of treasure hunts, booby traps, truffle shuffles, and the timeless story of kids on the adventure of a lifetime.
The Hobbit and The Lord of the Rings: Journey to Middle-earth with LEGO® The Hobbit and The Lord of the Rings™ minifigures! Collect Frodo, Aragorn, Gandalf, Legolas, Gimli, and the entire Fellowship. Face Sauron, Saruman, Uruk-hai, and the Witch-king. From Bilbo's adventure in The Hobbit to the War of the Ring, these minifigures span J.R.R. Tolkien's legendary fantasy epic. Build the Mines of Moria, Helm's Deep, Rivendell, and Mount Doom. With incredible detail in costumes, weapons, and hair pieces, these figures capture Peter Jackson's film adaptations. Perfect for fans of fantasy, epic quests, and the timeless battle between good and evil in literature's greatest adventure.
The Incredibles: Save the world with LEGO® The Incredibles™ minifigures! Based on Pixar's superhero family films, collect Mr. Incredible, Elastigirl, Violet, Dash, and Jack-Jack Parr. Face villains like Syndrome, the Underminer, and Screenslaver. These minifigures feature superhero suits, powers, and the Parr family's dynamics from both films. Build the Underminer's attack, the Incredible house, and recreate family superhero action. From super strength to elasticity to force fields, each family member brings unique abilities. Perfect for Pixar fans who love superheroes, family dynamics, and the challenges of balancing normal life with saving the world repeatedly.
The Lone Ranger: Hi-Yo, Silver! LEGO® The Lone Ranger™ minifigures bring the Wild West hero to life. Based on the 2013 film, collect the Lone Ranger, his faithful companion Tonto, and villains like Butch Cavendish. These Western minifigures feature detailed period costumes, revolvers, and the Lone Ranger's iconic mask. Build trains, frontier towns, and desert shootouts in the Old West. Though a single-year theme tied to Disney's film, The Lone Ranger delivered classic Western action and adventure. Perfect for fans of Westerns, frontier justice, and the masked hero who fought for law and order across the American West.
The Powerpuff Girls: Sugar, spice, and everything nice! LEGO® The Powerpuff Girls™ minifigures bring the superhero sisters to Townsville. Collect Blossom, Bubbles, and Buttercup as they battle Mojo Jojo and defend their city. These minifigures capture Cartoon Network's distinctive animation style with unique printing and building techniques. Though a limited release through LEGO Dimensions and Ideas, Powerpuff Girls fans cherish these representations of the pint-sized heroes. From Chemical X to kindergarten to saving the day, these figures celebrate girl power and superhero action. Perfect for fans of the classic animated series who grew up with these powerful, adorable heroes.
Toy Story: You've got a friend in LEGO® Toy Story™ minifigures! Bring Pixar's beloved franchise to life with Woody, Buzz Lightyear, Jessie, Rex, Hamm, Slinky Dog, Bo Peep, and all of Andy's (and Bonnie's) toys. Collect characters from all four films, including villains like Lots-o'-Huggin' Bear and Gabby Gabby. These minifigures capture the heart and humor that made Toy Story a cultural phenomenon. Build Pizza Planet, Andy's Room, and Bonnie's house. From the original 1995 groundbreaking film to Toy Story 4's emotional conclusion, these figures celebrate friendship, growing up, and the magic of toys. Perfect for Pixar fans of all ages.
Trolls World Tour: Get your glitter on with LEGO® Trolls World Tour™ minifigures! Based on DreamWorks' colorful animated films, collect Poppy, Branch, and the diverse troll tribes. These vibrant minifigures feature wild hair, bright colors, and the optimistic energy of the Trolls franchise. Build concert stages, pod homes, and musical adventures. With different music genres represented through various troll tribes, celebrate diversity and the power of music. Though a brief theme, Trolls delivered colorful building and positive messages. Perfect for young builders who love music, friendship, bright colors, and the infectious optimism that defines the Trolls universe.
Ultra Agents: Fight Antimatter with LEGO® Ultra Agents™ minifigures! This 2014-2015 sci-fi theme featured a team of specialized agents battling supervillains. Collect Agent Jack Fury, Agent Caila Phoenix, Agent Steve Zeal, and Agent Solomon Blaze as they face Psyclone, AntiMatter, Spyclops, and Toxikita. These minifigures featured futuristic designs, specialized weapons, and vehicles with advanced technology. From super speed to super strength, each villain had unique powers requiring tactical teamwork. Ultra Agents combined superheroes with sci-fi espionage. Perfect for fans of secret agents, team tactics, and battling supervillains with advanced technology and clever strategies.
Unikitty!: Build something awesome with LEGO® Unikitty!™ minifigures! From The LEGO Movie's breakout character comes a dedicated theme. Collect Unikitty, Puppycorn, Dr. Fox, Hawkodile, and Richard in various emotional states and adventures in the Cloud Kingdom. These minifigures feature buildable brick-built bodies and interchangeable expressions showing Unikitty's mood swings from happy to angry. Face Master Frown and Brock who want to make everyone sad. With bright colors, positive energy, and creative building, Unikitty celebrates imagination and emotions. Perfect for fans who love kawaii aesthetics, positivity, and the character who steals every scene with cuteness and rage.
Vikings: Raid and conquer with LEGO® Vikings™ minifigures! This 2005-2006 theme featured Norse warriors with detailed helmets, beards, weapons, and armor. Collect Viking raiders with horned helmets (historically inaccurate but iconically Viking) and face their enemies in medieval Scandinavian warfare. Build longships, fortresses, and battle scenes. Though brief, Vikings delivered historical action with LEGO's creative twist. These bearded warriors featured excellent detail in chainmail, weapons, and intimidating appearances. Perfect for fans of Norse history, Viking culture, raiders, and the seafaring warriors who shaped medieval European history with their legendary raids and exploration.
Wednesday: It's always Monday with LEGO® Wednesday™ minifigures! Based on Netflix's hit series, collect Wednesday Addams, Enid Sinclair, Thing, and characters from Nevermore Academy. These minifigures capture Wednesday's gothic aesthetic, Enid's colorful personality, and the show's dark humor. Build locations from the supernatural school and recreate mystery-solving adventures. With incredible detail in Wednesday's braids, Thing's disembodied hand, and the show's Tim Burton-esque style, these figures bring the viral sensation to LEGO. Perfect for fans of gothic mystery, supernatural schools, coming-of-age stories, and the Addams family's most famous daughter.
Wicked: Defy gravity with LEGO® Wicked™ minifigures! Based on the phenomenally successful Broadway musical and films, collect Elphaba (the Wicked Witch of the West) and Glinda the Good in their stunning costumes. These minifigures celebrate the untold story of the Witches of Oz before Dorothy arrived. With elaborate dresses, distinctive looks, and theatrical designs, recreate iconic moments from the musical. From Shiz University to the Emerald City, build the world of Oz reimagined. Perfect for theater fans, musical lovers, and anyone enchanted by the story of friendship, standing up for what's right, and the origins of Oz's most famous witches.
World Racers: Race around the world with LEGO® World Racers™ minifigures! This 2010 racing theme featured teams competing in exotic global locations. Collect racers from Team Xtreme and their rivals in high-speed competitions through deserts, jungles, ice fields, and cities worldwide. These minifigures featured distinctive racing suits, helmets, and attitude. Build extreme vehicles designed for rough terrain and intense racing action. Though a single-year theme, World Racers delivered international racing excitement with diverse settings. Perfect for racing fans who love extreme vehicles, global adventure, and competition-driven action across Earth's most challenging environments.
